what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
Its target is the board:// URI 'board://item-49318781'.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-49318781.
The file is purely a typed attachment stub with no payload beyond metadata.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Target references a board item via a board:// URI.
concerns: No payload or descriptive content beyond the metadata link.
The referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone.
No author/editor or modification history is recorded.
notes: A metadata stub that attaches att-50dfd4e4 to board item item-49318781 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment actually represent?
What is the nature or topic of board item item-49318781?
Who created this attachment and was it ever modified?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file records an attachment relationship of type board_items to a board item, which is exactly what its metadata indicates.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, queryable association between a channel attachment and a board item so the relationship can be discovered and traversed later.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped attachment-to-board-item reference that a fused system can keep for channel-memory traversal and correlation.
summary_for_embedding: This is a metadata-only channel attachment file (att-50dfd4e4) of type board_items that links the dragnet-development channel to board item item-49318781 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to register an attachment reference from a channel artifact to a specific board item for later retrieval and correlation.
